$schema: SEP Tracker data index — see /data/SCHEMA.md for full documentation

sources.title: Strategic Energy Plan: Pathways to 100% Renewable Energy
2025 Annual Progress Report & Strategic Energy Plan Implementation Year Three
sources.publisher: City of Greensboro, Office of Sustainability and Resilience

reportCadence.label: OSR established / first Chief Sustainability Officer hired
Strategic Energy Plan (SEP) published
reportCadence.note: Resolution required submission to Council within one year of adoption (~Dec 2020); the SEP was not finalized until Nov 2022, roughly 2 years 11 months after adoption.

reportCadence.label: Second Annual Progress Report
reportCadence.note: Publication date not stated in either source document. This report ('Implementation Year Three') is described as 'the third annual progress report,' implying a second report was published in the 2024-2025 window, but its exact date is not given. Flagged as a data gap, not omitted.

reportCadence.label: Third Annual Progress Report (2025 Progress Report / Implementation Year Three)

twoDocumentCitation.table: optional: table caption as printed in the source document, e.g. 'Table 3'

externalCitation.description: Used for facts sourced independently of the two SEP documents — e.g. Legistar records, City press releases, live City web pages. Structurally and visually distinct from twoDocumentCitation everywhere it's rendered: it did not come from the City's own SEP reporting, so it carries different evidentiary weight and must not be presented as if it did. See SCHEMA.md 'External citations' for the rationale and every UI-rendering rule.
externalCitation.sourceType: 'external' (literal) — presence of this key, instead of 'source', is what distinguishes an external citation
externalCitation.title: full title of the record/document/page
externalCitation.retrievedDate: ISO date this tool's research retrieved/verified the fact
externalCitation.note: optional free-text clarification, e.g. why it wasn't in either SEP source
